all.en: We are pleased to invite you to the Asia Pacific Logistics Summit 2026.
all.zh: 我們很高興邀請您參加 2026 亞太物流高峰會。

all.en: The conference will take place from June 14 to June 16 in Singapore.
all.zh: 本會議將於 6 月 14 日至 6 月 16 日在新加坡舉行。

all.en: This year marks the tenth anniversary of our flagship industry event.
all.zh: 今年是我們旗艦級產業活動的十週年。

all.en: More than four thousand professionals from over sixty countries are expected.
all.zh: 預計將有來自六十多個國家、超過四千名專業人士出席。

all.en: The theme of the summit is Resilient Supply Chains in a Changing World.
all.zh: 本次高峰會主題為「變動世界中的韌性供應鏈」。

all.en: Keynote speakers include executives from leading global shipping companies.
all.zh: 主題講者包括全球領先航運公司的高階主管。

all.en: Featured topics include green logistics, automation, and cross-border trade.
all.zh: 重點議題包括綠色物流、自動化與跨境貿易。

all.en: Each day begins with a plenary session at the Marina Bay Convention Centre.
all.zh: 每日活動將於濱海灣會議中心的全體大會揭開序幕。

all.en: Afternoon panels will be held in eight breakout rooms on the second floor.
all.zh: 下午的座談會將於二樓的八間分組會議室舉行。

all.en: Attendees may also join guided tours of the new automated container terminal.
all.zh: 與會者亦可參加新建自動化貨櫃碼頭的導覽行程。

all.en: The exhibition hall will feature over two hundred technology vendors.
all.zh: 展覽廳將有超過兩百家科技廠商參展。

all.en: Live demonstrations of warehouse robotics will run throughout the event.
all.zh: 倉儲機器人現場示範將在整個活動期間進行。

all.en: A networking reception is scheduled for the evening of June 14.
all.zh: 歡迎酒會安排於 6 月 14 日傍晚舉行。

all.en: The gala dinner on June 15 will recognize this year's industry award winners.
all.zh: 6 月 15 日的晚宴將表揚本年度產業大獎得主。

all.en: Early bird registration is available until April 30 at a discounted rate.
all.zh: 早鳥報名優惠開放至 4 月 30 日截止。

all.en: Group bookings of five or more delegates receive an additional ten percent off.
all.zh: 五人以上團體報名可再享九折優惠。

all.en: Registration includes daily lunches, refreshments, and all session materials.
all.zh: 報名費含每日午餐、茶點與所有議程資料。

all.en: A complimentary shuttle will operate between partner hotels and the venue.
all.zh: 合作飯店與會場之間將提供免費接駁車。

all.en: Simultaneous interpretation will be provided in English, Mandarin, and Japanese.
all.zh: 現場將提供英語、華語與日語同步口譯。

all.en: We kindly ask delegates to confirm their attendance by May 20.
all.zh: 請與會者於 5 月 20 日前確認出席。

all.en: Visa support letters are available upon request from our secretariat.
all.zh: 如有需要，可向大會秘書處申請簽證邀請函。

all.en: Sponsorship opportunities at three tiers remain open until April 15.
all.zh: 三種等級的贊助方案開放至 4 月 15 日。

all.en: For inquiries, please contact our team at summit@aplogistics.org.
all.zh: 如有任何問題，請洽 summit@aplogistics.org。

all.en: We look forward to welcoming you to a productive and memorable summit.
all.zh: 我們期待迎接您共度一場豐碩且難忘的高峰會。
